headline: Revvity Expands Signals AI Ecosystem Through Anthropic Claude Integration
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., July 01, 2026--Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY) announced that its Revvity Signals Software business has joined Anthropic's directory for Model Context Protocol (MCP) connectors, enabling scientists to access Signals AI capabilities and connected R&D knowledge through Claude, including Claude Science, Anthropic’s new AI workbench for scientific research.
